current_positions.statement: Reimbursement requests should not arrive weeks later without advance notice and supporting receipts.

proposals.statement: Both parents are open to a child-expense package built around advance notice, shared receipts, and a short reimbursement response window.

current_positions.statement: Expense coordination should stay fair and workable rather than turning into one-sided approval power.
